MINI MINUTES: Judge: Suzanne Ramos Bolanos, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/SRB)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Board of Trustees of the California State University is present, represented by Jenny Valdez Patino.
Attorney Charles Alfonzo for the plaintiff.
Defendants Samuel Mtoto and Tatayana Butcher are present.
Attorney Charles Oshinuga appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 16, 2016 remains on calendar.
